name: k6-ecommerce-framework
description: Production-ready k6 TypeScript framework for load testing Australian eCommerce platforms

scripts.test:load:platypus-au: k6 run --vus 200 --duration 10m -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging --out json=results/platypus-au-pdp.json src/tests/pdp-load.test.ts
scripts.test:load:platypus-au:prod: k6 run --vus 200 --duration 10m -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=production --out json=results/platypus-au-pdp-prod.json src/tests/pdp-load.test.ts

scripts.dashboard:platypus-au: k6 run --out web-dashboard --vus 50 --duration 5m -e SITE=platypus-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging src/tests/pdp-load.test.ts
scripts.dashboard:skechers-au: k6 run --out web-dashboard --vus 50 --duration 5m -e SITE=skechers-au -e ENVIRONMENT=staging src/tests/pdp-load.test.ts
